acholi.click_tiles_above_to_build_an_equation: Dii tiles ma malo me cwe equation...
acholi.value_to_apply_to_both_sides: Value to apply to both sides
acholi.ask_the_ai_tutor_anything_about_algebr: Ask the AI tutor anything about algebra!
acholi.linear_quadratic_factoring_system_simp: Linear, quadratic, factoring, system, simplify. AI shows every step + names the property used (distributive, combining like terms, FOIL). Common AP / SAT / Algebra-1 problems all reduce to ~8 transformations.
acholi.multi_difficulty_problem_sets_the_ai_c: Multi-difficulty problem sets. The AI checks your answer and walks through the full worked solution so you can see exactly where your steps diverged. Builds the habit of writing math, not just guessing.
acholi.pick_variables_operations_target_value: Pick variables + operations + target value; system generates an algebra problem matching your design. Useful for teachers building worksheets and for students reverse-engineering "what makes a problem hard."
acholi.drag_weights_onto_a_balance_to_model_x: Drag weights onto a balance to model x + 3 = 7 visually. The single most useful intuition for early algebra — equations are scales, not blanks to fill in. Whatever you do to one side, do to the other.
acholi.ask_the_tutor_about_any_algebra_concep: Ask the tutor about any algebra concept or stuck-step. Tutor knows your grade band, recent attempts, and the active problem. Best for "why didn't my approach work?" questions.
